hero.subtitle: PITH distills your prompts by stripping away human verbosity. Save tokens, get more direct answers, and boost the efficiency of your AI calls.

demo.title: PITH Demo
demo.default_input: I need you to help me think about how I should build the backend for a ticket purchasing system. I want to make sure the system supports multiple currencies and different product categories like VIP, Premiere, and Stage. Can you help me figure out the best approach?

how_it_works.title: How PITH works
how_it_works.subtitle: A simple three-step process that transforms how you interact with LLMs.
how_it_works.step_1_desc: Use PITH in the Chrome extension or via API. Write the way you always do — no need to change your workflow.
how_it_works.step_2_desc: Before reaching the AI, your prompt is automatically distilled: empty words out, pure intent in. Fewer tokens, same result.
how_it_works.step_3_desc: Fewer tokens sent = less money spent. Every compression reduces your costs on GPT-4, Claude, and other LLMs per call.

pricing.title: The right size for you
pricing.subtitle: From daily use to enterprise integrations. Choose how you want to use PITH.
pricing.extension_desc: For users who want better answers from ChatGPT and Claude.
pricing.api_desc: Distill prompts from your users before calling OpenAI, saving tokens for your company.
pricing.api_subtitle: Cover the cost with the savings generated
pricing.vscode_desc: Direct access from your IDE to generate code faster using AI.

api_key.empty_2: API keys are available on the PRO plan.

header.title: API Documentation
header.subtitle: The PITH API compresses your prompts before sending them to any LLM. Use it in any language with a single HTTP call.

auth.title: Authentication
auth.subtitle: Accepted authentication methods in the Authorization header:
auth.note: The /v1/license/validate route does not require an authorization header, as the key is in the payload.

rate_limit.title: Rate Limiting
rate_limit.dashboard_link: Generate your API Key in the dashboard

summary.optimize: Compresses a prompt using the PITH engine. Removes verbosity, filler words, and semantic noise. Returns distilled text and compression metrics. Requires authentication and respects plan rate limits (100/mo on Free, unlimited on Pro).
summary.stats: Returns cumulative stats for the authenticated user: total tokens saved, total compressions performed, average noise removed, dollar savings, and current month usage.
summary.user: Returns the authenticated user's profile: ID, current tier (free | pro), and API key if it exists.
summary.api_key: Generates or rotates the user's API key. Destructive operation — previous key is immediately invalidated. Available only for Pro plan users.
summary.sync: Syncs locally saved tokens (accumulated offline or via extension) with the backend. Useful for consolidating cross-device metrics after login.
summary.validate: Validates an API Key for use in extensions (VS Code, Chrome). Returns user tier and unlocked features.

errors.title: Error Codes
errors.e400: Invalid payload — missing required field or out of bounds.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.hero: At PITH, we believe your intellectual property should stay with you. We reduce tokens, not your privacy.

sections.s1_title: 1. Active Privacy by Design (Zero Data Retention)
sections.s1_desc: PITH was built on a core principle: your original data does not belong to us. When using our API or extension, your original prompt text is processed by our Distillation Engine (Zero-G) in memory. We do not save what you type, nor the result. We store exclusively mathematical metadata (characters in, characters out, tokens saved) for billing and dashboard display purposes.
sections.s2_title: 2. PITH and AI Models (OpenAI, Anthropic, etc)
sections.s2_desc: PITH acts as a restrictive middleware. We do not send your data to OpenAI, Google, or Anthropic on your behalf from our servers. PITH converts your extensive prompt into 'Machine Language' (PITH) and returns it to you (or to your local machine via extension/API). Subsequent sending of this distilled text to the final AI is under your full control and responsibility, using your own credentials.
sections.s3_desc: For the web platform's functioning, we collect strictly operational data through our authentication provider (Supabase) and payment provider (Stripe). This includes: email address (for login and operational communication), financial usage history (tokens saved), extension ID, and API keys (encrypted).
sections.s4_desc: PITH's Chrome extension processes text locally in your browser's active tab. If you are using a connected PITH account, the extension communicates with our servers only to sync your mathematical history of saved tokens and monthly quota. At no time is the content of your local ChatGPT or Claude conversations transmitted to PITH servers.
sections.s5_desc: All communication with our servers is encrypted via HTTPS/TLS. Operational metadata and account information are stored in secure serverless infrastructure. Your platform-generated API keys are restricted and should not be exposed publicly on the client-side.

footer.questions: Questions about how we handle your data? Get in touch by sending a hello to
